popularStory.description: Eleanor of Landcaster (Countess of Arundel) died four years prior to Earl Richard FitzAlan. In his will Richard requested to be buried "near to the tomb of Eleanor de Lancaster, my wife; and I desire …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor of Lancaster於1318年9月11日出生在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾卡素時，她的父親Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster38歲，母親Maud de Chaworth36歲。她於1330年11月6日與John de Beaumont 2nd Lord Beaumont結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1372年1月11日在英國素可阿盧德爾 卡素享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可列維斯列維斯 聖 約翰 維特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor of Lancaster于1318年9月11日出生在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾卡素时，她的父亲Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster38岁，母亲Maud de Chaworth36岁。她于1330年11月6日与John de Beaumont 2nd Lord Beaumont结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1372年1月11日在英国素可阿盧德爾 卡素享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素可列維斯列維斯 聖 約翰 維特。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Lancaster
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Lancaster in northwestern England, which is recorded as Loncastre in 1086. The place takes its name from the river Lune + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’ (from Latin castra ‘legionary camp’). The river name is probably British, perhaps related to Gaelic slán ‘healthy’, ‘salubrious’.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor of Lancaster was born on 11 September 1318, in Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales, her father, Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster, was 38 and her mother, Maud de Chaworth, was 36. She married John de Beaumont 2nd Lord Beaumont on 6 November 1330. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 11 January 1372, in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Lewes St John Without, Lewes, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé John de Beaumont 2nd Lord Beaumont le 6 novembre 1330. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 11 janvier 1372, à Arundel Castle, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Lewes St John Without, Lewes, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor of Lancaster am 11. September 1318 in Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster 38 und ihre Mutter Maud de Chaworth 36. Sie hat am 6. November 1330 John de Beaumont 2nd Lord Beaumont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 11. Januar 1372 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England und wurde in Lewes St John Without, Lewes, Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato John de Beaumont 2nd Lord Beaumont il 6 novembre 1330. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor of Lancaster(이)가 1318년 9월 11일 웨일스 몽고머이실르 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Chaworth(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1330년 11월 6일 John de Beaumont 2nd Lord Beaumont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1372년 1월 11일 영국 수세스 아런들 카스틀에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 루스 루스 스트 존 위토우트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor of Lancaster nasceu em 11 de setembro de 1318, em Castle, Montgomeryshire, Gales, seu pai, Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Chaworth, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Beaumont 2nd Lord Beaumont em 6 de novembro de 1330. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor of Lancaster родилась 11 сентября 1318 г. в местности кастл, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Chaworth, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Beaumont 2nd Lord Beaumont 6 ноября 1330 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 11 января 1372 г. в местности арундель кастл, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности львесь ст джон витоут, львесь, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con John de Beaumont 2nd Lord Beaumont el 6 de noviembre de 1330. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 11 de enero de 1372, en Arundel Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Lewes St John Without, Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
